name: Kotak PVR Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹75,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: Buy 1 Get 1 free PVR movie ticket (once per month)

welcomeBenefits.description: 2 complimentary PVR movie tickets on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver for the next year

additionalBenefits: Buy 1 Get 1 free PVR movie ticket every month
Exclusive discounts on PVR food and beverages
Priority booking access for new movie releases at PVR
2% cashback on dining complements the entertainment theme
pros: Buy 1 Get 1 PVR ticket every month can save ₹250-400 monthly for regular moviegoers
Welcome gift of 2 PVR tickets more than covers the joining fee
Very low annual fee of ₹299 with easy ₹75K waiver threshold
2% cashback on dining pairs well with the entertainment focus
Low income requirement makes it accessible
cons: BOGO benefit limited to only 1 redemption per month
Only 1% cashback on non-dining spends is below average
Niche card with limited value for non-PVR moviegoers
idealFor: Regular PVR moviegoers who watch at least 1-2 movies per month
Entertainment enthusiasts who also dine out frequently
Budget-conscious users looking for a low-fee card with tangible entertainment perks

faqs.question: How does the Buy 1 Get 1 PVR ticket offer work?
faqs.answer: You can book 2 PVR movie tickets and get 1 free (up to ₹250 off) once per month. The offer is applicable through the PVR website or app using your Kotak PVR card.

faqs.question: Are the welcome PVR tickets sent physically or digitally?
faqs.answer: The 2 welcome PVR tickets are provided as e-vouchers sent to your registered email address upon card activation and completion of the first transaction.

faqs.question: Does the BOGO offer work at all PVR formats including PVR INOX?
faqs.answer: Yes, following the PVR-INOX merger, the Buy 1 Get 1 offer is valid across PVR INOX cinemas nationwide, subject to the monthly limit of 1 redemption.
